questions: What is the suspected or confirmed cause of the pericarditis (e.g., Viral, Bacterial, Tuberculosis, Uremia, Connective Tissue Disorder, Malignancy, Radiation, Trauma)?
Is the patient able to take oral medication? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have pericardial effusion? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have cardiac tamponade? (Yes/No)
